creator: christos@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to 64GBRAMbutWINCRASH from comment #8)

I am not sure this is related to the sound driver bug mentioned here, which has been fixed in 44e128fe9d92. These errors are coming from the USB driver, not the sound one.

It's better to open a new bug report and CC freebsd-usb@.
